commit_message:
Added BSD-2 clause license Added BSD-2 clause license Adding BSD-2 clause license to my axi4 interface source files.
Wouldn't it be better if I had a Collaborator's access to this repository?. 
Would be easier since I am planning to add improvements to the axi4 test bench and add a sh256 decryptor implementation as well.
Note - This is entirely up to you and I will continue contributing to this project irrespective of the decision you take.
